reviews.review_description: I purchased this game and i am a police officer so it trily stand out for  me. Buy it! Thank me later. I'm giving it 4.9 stars only because nothing in this world is perfect. 😊
This was a blast to play with friends. I like setting the boundary to roomscale and running around in a firefight.
Shouldnt be an 18 should be a 12 or even 7 but its amazing so fun
This game ain't s*** waste of money try to get refund for some reason would not let me was not able to get it back

developer_response.body: I’m sorry your refund request wasn’t accepted, but that process is handled by the platform and isn’t something we can control. The game also has “Try Before You Buy” enabled, so players can test it before deciding to purchase. If you had any issue with the game, please let us know. Your feedback would be very helpful.

reviews.review_description: says its a sitting compatible game!!!! ITS NOT DO NOT BUY IF UR DISABLED

developer_response.body: Hello, just to clarify: you can pick up the riot shield, so you won’t need to crouch and you can play seated.

reviews.review_description:
I love it, its fun its coop or single player, gets right to the point. The creativity is noticeable and as a very fun atmosphere in a sense and an array of weapons and skins. This is one of the few VR games that uses VR the right way so I do give it a thumbs up.

As far as my critiques I have a few but they arnt to degrade but maybe just more suggestions if I may

1. The game is somewhat short as I was able to accomplish all levels in a day or two. I totally get its an arcade style game but it does need a bit more content and I'd even say maybe some levels that require you to defend. You guys made these levels really fun so I think asking for more is a good thing here. 

2. Im not entirely sure but ive tried playing online and got no one to join or to join and I even waited awhile at one point so all ive ever managed to have are the swat troops you provide which is great but they cant shoot worth a hoot, they perish too quickly. What would make the game more fun in regards to the backup you get is to be able to upgrade and perhaps build up the number of swat bots you can have and chopper support. That could be a good way to use up the coin you gain. 

3: upgrades? I keep thinking there's a way to improve yourself but there isnt. Adding in body armor or certain armored gear you can earn would be ideal especially if you are facing enemies who all have 100 percent precision. Maybe a variety of shields you can see or shoot through or plant on the ground. A turret? Anyhow thats about the extent of my suggestions.

If the game is complete and no more updates are being made thats fine, I still recommend this particular game as it is really fun to play. Add it to your library of worthy VR games

Feels like your in a real shootout.
This is definitely a must have
Shoot your way to play game.

reviews.review_title: Good but not what I thought it was
reviews.review_description: If you like the old arcade style games like time crisis you will love it but personally for me if u cant move around then its not really for me fun game but lack of movement let it down

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your feedback. Crisis Brigade 2 is intentionally designed as a rail shooter: fixed positions, quick firefights, then moving on to the next point.

That style is definitely not for everyone, but it helps many VR players avoid motion sickness and keeps the action comfortable. If you prefer free movement and open levels, it may simply not be your type of game.

reviews.review_description: One of greatest VR shooters that actually make you crouch for cover
Really fun VR version of an arcade shooter! Well designed, nice graphics, easy to pick up and hard to master. I’m a big fan of this one
Me and my buddy picked this game up to play co-op and we must say it was Really fun as a co-op we cover each other's sides while dodging bullets and explosions

Please, if you want to sell more, please support the weapon rotation setting (yaw), because the weapon angle is already supported. This way, you can also play with external (k3d or aces) weapons in the game, not just with a controller. Which provides a greater experience!
Dive right into the action with an addicting gameplay loop that challenges the player to improve.
Could probably do with some more levels or modes. Still fun and easy to play, a must  for Time Crisis fans👊🏾
Refunding this game just based solely on the fact that the front hand in 2-handed weapons is wildly inaccurate to my hand position

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback!
The hand positions on our two-handed weapons are actually accurate to the tracking data, so we’re not sure what specific issue you’re experiencing. Could you share a bit more detail, so we can see exactly what’s happening on your side? We’d love to help.

reviews.review_description: I recommend must buy
This game is better than spatial ops. I love that game the most. Until I played this. Great job.
Just needs an update right now hasn't been updated in for 2 whole years and it's such a good game.

reviews.review_title: A great game with alot of potential.
reviews.review_description:
The game is like time crisis mixed with a few action movies.

The game is very linear except for first few stages which give you a few welcomed paths (all stages should have this)

The best moments are the ones where you have options of where to stick out from cover, finding a gap in a bench to crouch and shoot etc.

Best way to play it is to get physical and move around as much as you can like a true action hero.

Its a shame game is abandoned with no additional updates...

Stop reading the reviews. Buy it! You’re welcome! 

Please make another!!!

Surprised this doesn’t have more reviews. I’m absolutely loving this game. It’s a cover shooter with progression. A lot of shooters can feel bullet spongy but this game has a satisfying one shot kill on normal enemies. Expect an arcade style experience similar to house of the dead and time crisis. Mechanics are solid and gameplay is constant action with very little if any fluff. If you want to just shoot bad guys and have a good time this is the game for you.

The only heads up I’ll say is the cover mechanic is not a button press like you may expect. You have to physically move around ie duck behind a box or move behind a vehicle. So if you aren’t very active you may find this gives a little bit of a workout. My legs were sore the next day from crouching so much the first time I played.

Great experience with this shooter! It has a lot of different chapters all storydriven that takes you to different scenes with different end bosses. Although it is a shootinggameit still has good moments of humour for example in the middle of a story when you enter a elevator and you can hear the calmy but highly irritating sound of music, just before you step out and be part of a shooting situation once again. The environment, weapons and opponents are all looking great and really add to the game.
Can only hope for more chapters in a update.

Highly recommended !!!

￼ you know, I read the first review and I agree I don’t understand why there aren’t any more reviews so I guess I’m going to end up breathing this. I think this is a great game very action pack and has zombies who doesn’t love blasting zombies head off anyway if I could get it more stars, I would give it 10 stars￼
Great game..love the basics of duck and cover and then unleash hell! Great game to play co-op..need more levels!! Need a Crisis Brigade 3!! More! More! More!
Love the CO-OP! Great Arcade style. Love the special guests in the stories.

Alright, buckle up, buttercups, because I tried the free nibble of this VR game and ended up swallowing the whole darn thing! It's like Time Crisis went on a wild, immersive bender and came back as a glorious, head-mounted shooter-fest.

They've got a "Rookie" mode, which is basically them holding your hand and saying, "See? You can point! Now try it with explosions!" Then, they rip off the training wheels and unleash chaos, and suddenly you're sweating like you're trying to parallel park a semi-truck in a sauna.

Word of warning: if your hand-eye coordination is so bad you can't hit a barn door with a bazooka, maybe stick to virtual gardening. But if you've ever dreamt of being a digital John Wick, this is your jam.

I'm already planning a VR night with my mates, which will either be a glorious display of sharpshooting skill or a hilarious montage of flailing limbs and panicked screams. Either way, it's gonna be legendary. 10/10, would point and shoot again (and again, and again...).
I wish there was more levels on story mode but amazing 👍

I don't know what happened, I can't do more than 2 co-ops.  When 3rd person tries to join in said. The private room is full. This never happened before. We are all in one physical place. Wifi is fast.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the clarification! Crisis Brigade 2 never had 3-player co-op. I guess you might be thinking of the original Crisis VRigade, which did support 3-player co-op.

reviews.review_description: So much like time crisis 2 i love this game so much just brings back that nostalgic hit of arcade shooters it is by far one of the most fun games i got on quest 3 atm Cant wait to see what else they do with this game <33

This game is very fun, it is true that it has too few levels, but the levels it has are very fun.

best experience is with friends.
This game is super close to Aim Assault and the old Time crisis.Action packed and challenging.
Can't play with friends as co-op.

developer_response.body: Hi there! It’s possible you ran into a temporary issue. The game does support cross-platform co-op, so you should be able to play together without problems.

reviews.review_description: Great game! BUT it does have its issues. Mainly with starting up the game lol. It goes gray and doesn’t even register the borders for my safety. Only way to get out of the game at this point is to restart the ￼oculus. An annoying process to just start the game. I would agree with you IF it didn’t only happen with YOUR game. I played games before and after and they all worked just fine. What else can I do differently?

developer_response.body: Hello! that seems a problem with the headset, perhaps you should update to the last version or making a hard reset may fix the issue.

reviews.review_description:
Came across this randomly while doom scrolling on the Meta Store and thought to give it a try as there was a trial. I couldn't buy this game fast enough! I immediately regressed to my childhood, back to the height of the lightgun era with a smile on my face. Great visuals, the action is fast paced and it has loads of replayability.

If you want an arcade shooter that you can jump straight in with,  the one you are looking for.

This game is perfect for VR beginners — I was drenched in sweat and had an absolute blast! That said, I do have a few questions:

Is it normal that the assault rifle doesn’t have a full-auto fire mode? Also, when the assault rifle and SMG run out of ammo, I can reload and immediately fire without having to pull the charging handle. I understand this might be a gameplay-oriented compromise, but I sincerely hope the charging handle functionality can be restored.

That aside, I just have to say — this game is incredibly fun!

developer_response.body:
Hello! Thank you for taking the time to leave a review! The game offers manual reload, where you have to reload the weapon yourself, just select it at the start of the game.

Please note that the game doesn’t allow changing the fire rate of weapons, so the assault rifle cannot be set to full-auto.

reviews.review_title: Great game! Please add mirrored support
reviews.review_description:
First, if you played time crisis this is a must have. I'm a lefty and the levels are not mirrored so it doesn't feel natural. Here is my full review:

Gameplay and Features


Cover and Shoot Mechanics: 

Players must physically duck for cover, adding a thrilling physical element to the gameplay. The game includes a riot shield, which can be used as an accessibility feature but is typically assigned to the right hand.

Intense Shootouts: 

The game features intense shootouts with powerful weapons and challenging levels, making it feel like a true VR successor to classic arcade shooters.

Replayability: 

With a progression system that allows customization and upgrades, the game offers high replayability, even though the missions are relatively short.

Left-Handed Players:

No Mirrored Levels: The game does not mirror levels for left-handed players, which can make certain areas more challenging due to the layout favoring right-handed players.

Workaround: Left-handed players can pick up weapons with their left hand, but this doesn't fully address the lack of mirrored mode for the levels. 

All in all I recommend this game, however, if you are a southpaw you will quickly understand. 

I would have given a 5/5 if I were right handed :-)

reviews.review_title: One of the best games for single user!
reviews.review_description: I have meta quest 3 and this game is one of the best games out there for single user; just go for it and enjoy.
Great arcade shooter that works great with a Woojer Vest. Do yourself a favour and pick this up as you will not be disappointed.
We cannot join to the same room for coop (2x Quest 3, both users own a game). This is only game whre we cannot join together. We both enter private and same code and nothing happens. Just waiting...

developer_response.body:
Hello!

Apologies for the inconvenience. This issue can occur due to a few possible reasons:
- Version mismatch: Make sure all players are using the same version of the game.
- Temporary server issue: There might be a short-term problem with the online service provider. If so, please try again.

Thanks for your patience!

reviews.review_description: First let me start off by saying you do NOT get enough health. 3 shots and you’re dead. Not to mention you have basically no cover. Your teammates get one shot as soon as you start the level, reloading is a nightmare in the middle of a gunfight, money is too grindy; the prices are crazy. I have to grind a level 10 or 20 times to even get close to my goal for a new gun. Everything I just listed, was played on rookie….this is the dark souls of shooters…

developer_response.body:
Let me clarify: a rookie has 5 lives instead of 3. If you find manual reloading difficult, you can enable automatic reloading, which can be triggered with a single button. Veteran and Hell modes are designed for hardcore players, while Rookie mode is much more accessible—even if you don’t take cover as often as you should. 
It's definitely not a Dark Souls.

reviews.review_title: Should be on every top 100 VR games list
reviews.review_description: Late 90's/early 00's arcade goers will feel right at home here. I do wish it had the option for smooth motion area transitions(if there is, I haven't seen it). But that is a tiny gripe. This game is simply amazing!
An incredibly fun game to play, with plenty of content. This is one of the games I like to show people new to VR, it's got the right balance of arcade fun and action to give a great first impression.

Love light gun games and this is my favourite on quest 3 
Please do a sequel or new levels my moneys ready

If your new to VR and have issues with motion sickness, but love shooting guns/people trying to kill you. Well this is the game. Lots of diff weapons as you complete levels to upgrade. Manual and auto reload capabilities. Fun surroundings and story line. Online co op is fun. 5/5 🙂

This game is amazing and totally worth getting. If you grew up with Time Crisis, Ninja Assault, House of The Dead games, then you will love this. I hope they make more games like this or even a House Of The Dead for VR.

reviews.review_title: The best TimeCrisis in VR yet
reviews.review_description: It is so much fun to play, it's hard, it's fast, it's awesome!!!!!

reviews.review_title: Nice game to play with a friend online.
reviews.review_description: As the description says this game is like the vistual cop or the house of the dead from Sega in the 90s. It is perfect if you like stationary shooters! I wish it had more levels though as you can finish the campaign quite quickly. I don't see an update coming though so it is what it is. Still a 5 star for me.
Great game for any fan of VR shooters, fast paced and many varied levels
Great game zero motion sickness from it! And we have 2 oculus and love the 2 player option
This is one of the best vr games I have. If you love games like call of duty this is a game for you
I loved the game for the time I played but I got motion sickness from it and I will be refunding the game.

developer_response.body: Hello! We're very interested in your issue. The game is designed to prevent this. When do you usually feel motion sickness in the game?

reviews.review_description: I'm a couple hours in and this game hasn't stopped being fun. It's challenging on the higher difficulty but like those classic arcade shooters it leaves you wanting to master the level and better your score. Play this game for what it is... VR time crisis...esque
Really enjoy this game I am pretty awful at it but it’s so much fun
I love this game,👍
Fantastic, me and my 4 yr old grandson love it, plenty of action and easy to follow.
Just buy it please

This is a must-have VR shooter provided you are OK with its design limitations. Like the coin-op games of the 90s, you are in a fixed position and have to shoot pixellated enemies, some of which drop power-ups and health, which you then have to shoot to collect. The VR aspect adds the ability to duck, move, and shoot around corners, and instead of a 2D screen you're able to look around objects slightly, but that's all. You can't skillfully dodge bullets in the (in some ways better) Dead Second - you seem to get hit (and lose a health level) at random if you're exposed to an enemy. There are only (from what I see) 9 scenarios to play, but they're well designed. Enemy body hits are comic-book style "boom" stars, no blood, no rag-doll physics, and bodies disappear as soon as they hit the ground. A narrator with a British accent frequently says things out of sync with the game (e.g. there is one more enemy, but that enemy is already dead - devs, you should probably make him stop and say "oh you got them" instead of continuing to say the line). This causes confusion at the end of each scene. There are many criticisms to be made about the design of this game, but I think it was always supposed to be a minimally VR version of the old arcade games with light-gun controllers of the past. I can't blame them for that. At least you're not pumping quarters to keep going.
This game is trash it is super bad  I tryed it and it sucks

For the first three levels I would give you 10 out of five not five out of 10 but 10 out of five but here's why I gave you 5  star and I can change that if you answer my question

I really enjoy the game I did all three levels on all four boards but I am stuck on hell every time I come so close the game make it very harder and harder you either run out of ammunition or run out of lives it looks like it's designed to never be achieved can you let me know if someone did actually finish the game if not so I can move on because I do really like the game but there's no point of making it very hard to appoint but no one can finish it I don't want to spend hours on the last level trying to achieve it it becomes boring and this is where I'm at right now it's getting very boring thank you and good job on the ammunition on the guns on the sounds you've done good all of that last part let me know please.

developer_response.body: Hello! Our team in the studio has successfully completed Hell Mode, although it must be noted that this feat was not accomplished individually by all members. It's an exceptionally challenging level to conquer solo. However, we've observed that there are players who have managed to achieve this. Personally, I find Hell Mode to be much more enjoyable when played in co-op mode. I kindly request that you take these points into consideration and perhaps reconsider your review.

reviews.review_description:
This game was great. The boards got more and more challenging. I was disappointed at when I had beat all of the boards on each level and received all of the different guns and equipment. The creator needs to add more boards people shouldn't be able to beat the whole game within 2 hours. Would have like to rate 5 stars but it needs more boards. 

Update: 10/21/2023 Due to the Developers response to my critique. I have changed my review stars from 3 to 1 for being sarcastic. As I stated I beat all of the levels and boards. You shouldn't get smart when people are giving reviews of what you created. You should know the truth of what people think of the game. So if you make more games or add boards to this one you know what people like or don't like about the game.

developer_response.body:
Let me clarify that the game has 9 levels.
Probably you have chosen rookie level and you should try harder levels. Rookie is very, very easy, the taste for very casual players.
Veteran is the level to go for you. Also, you should take a look to Hell level, with limited ammunition that gives a very different experiece.

Update: I'd like to clarify something: I apologize if my tone came across as sarcastic in my previous message, as that was not my intention. I always aim to provide informative feedback to enhance your gaming experience. Regarding your comment about the game's brevity, I wanted to highlight that there are actually 9 levels available. It's not uncommon for players to only explore the initial 3 levels, missing out on the deeper challenges beyond. Additionally, some players overlook the different difficulty settings, so I wanted to emphasize their existence. Hell mode, in particular, offers a distinct and potentially more enjoyable experience. I genuinely hope you reconsider your review in light of this information. Your feedback is valuable, and I'm here to help you make the most of your gaming experience.

reviews.review_description: The game is slightly fun. In the main room u can choose your setup by shooting the equipment u wanna bring with u. Well u have to shoot multiples times to get your setup right. Something is wrong with game.

developer_response.body:
Hello, performing a reinstallation should resolve the problem, as it appears to be linked to an issue with the recent update. Our team is actively investigating this matter, though we regret to inform you that we have been unable to reproduce the problem ourselves. If you have any insights or suggestions that could aid us in resolving this issue, we would greatly appreciate your assistance. Please don't hesitate to reach out to us at sumalab@sumalab.com. Your input is invaluable to us.

Update 2: He contacted us and a reinstall was the fix. We don't know if the issue is related to us or it was a very unusual problem with the Meta update process, because we couldn't reproduce it. The update works fine in all our tests, if anyone has any hint, it will be more than welcome.

reviews.review_description: I thought you’d be able to move around and the game play is just kinda boring I thought it would be like another game called zero calibre(which I totally recommend to anyone who wants intense fast pace gameplay) and honestly I just don’t get the story behind it

developer_response.body: Hello! The game offers a "try before you buy" feature that allows you to play it for 20 minutes before the buy! Additionally, the game's description provides a clear concept of what it offers and there are lots of gameplays in youtube! However, if you had a preconceived notion that the game only involves using joysticks, you may have missed out on the immersive experience it offers. It's worth giving it a chance, as the game requires you to physically move your body to hide behind cover, adding a new level of interactivity that enhances the gameplay. So, keep an open mind and try it out for yourself!

reviews.review_description: t

You are not able to use joysticks to move around at all during the shooting scenes,

Then you get moved to the next scene.

It's awful.

developer_response.body: The game offers a "try before you buy" feature that allows you to play it for 20 minutes. Additionally, the game's description provides a clear concept of what it offers. However, if you had a preconceived notion that the game only involves using joysticks, you may have missed out on the immersive experience it offers. It's worth giving it a chance, as the game requires you to physically move your body to hide behind cover, adding a new level of interactivity that enhances the gameplay. So, keep an open mind and try it out for yourself!

reviews.review_description: I just want a refund your game is good but I just don’t like it

developer_response.body:
Hello,

As game developers, we would like to inform you that we do not have direct control over the refund process. To request a refund, we kindly ask you to launch the Meta Quest app on your Android phone or an Apple iPhone. For detailed instructions, you can visit this helpful guide: https://www.pocket-lint.com/how-to-refund-a-game-on-the-meta-quest-2/.

Additionally, we would like to highlight that our game offers a "try before you buy" option, allowing you to experience the game free of charge for a duration of 20 minutes. We believe this feature provides an opportunity to evaluate the game firsthand before making a purchase.

We kindly request you to reconsider your review, as it appears to be unrelated to the game itself. We appreciate your understanding and thank you for considering our request.

Best regards

developer_response.body: Let me clarify that there are 9 very different missions, each one with many levels. Each mission has its own personality and custom final boss.

reviews.review_description:
It's okay, but there are problems. 
Difficult, even on rookie. Or I just suck. There have been many other complaints about the difficulty in other reviews. It sure is peak gameplay when I'm blind firing behind cover, because a sliver of your head sticks out and you get shot up instantly. 

AI comrades last 10 seconds before dying. I know they shouldn't carry you, but I don't think they should be complete wastes. At best they're a distraction. 

Despite my complaints, it is a bit fun. Although the difficulty, even on rookie, is very frustrating.

Il be fair i havent played loads of games yet, cleared the first level. Messed around a little bit in game. But when i start up this game atm i dont start it up because i like it, ill start it up just to give it another chance.
This game is exactly why i distrust most reviews and find 90% of the reviews worthless.
Buy it, try it and when in doubt, ask for a refund.
In short its a onrail shooting (stationary shooting sections) game. Smal movement freedoms, crouch, left, right ect. You can look everywhere and shoot.  Do note nothing but shooting is translated to the controllers.
So all in all if you are unfit, and or limited by the fixed vr boundary because of limited space.
 It wil become a "smash the trigger fast game". 
If non of those 2 thing are a problem and you like fast action reflex games go for it. You wil like it.
1 star but thats because it has for me little gaming fun.

developer_response.body: If you didn't have much fun after clearing the first level, I recommend adjusting the difficulty to "Cadet" or "Veteran" for a more challenging experience. I assure you that it will be more enjoyable. However, if you still have mixed feelings, please reconsider your 1-star rating. Thank you for your feedback!

I suggest trying to uninstall the game and then reinstalling it to see if that resolves the problem. If the issue persists, it's possible that your headset may need a restart. However, if that doesn't work, I highly recommend contacting Oculus support for further assistance. They will be able to provide you with more specialized help and troubleshoot any technical issues you may be encountering.
